name: Alexis Morgan
label: Smaller racial gaps
strongestSignal: Black defendants had the longer adjusted incarceration sentences in the comparison with White defendants.
comparisonHighlights: The adjusted incarceration-to-serve gap was under one percentage point in the Black–White comparison.
The largest sentence-length difference in the fixture was about 7%.
Each racial group was evaluated separately; no combined minority category was used.
analysisWindow: Synthetic records from December 27, 2017 through December 27, 2025.

name: Devin Reed
label: Moderate racial gaps
strongestSignal: Black defendants had the longer adjusted incarceration sentences in the comparison with White defendants.
comparisonHighlights: Black defendants had an adjusted incarceration-to-serve rate about 13 percentage points higher than White defendants in the fixture comparison.
The largest adjusted sentence-length difference was about 40%.
The uncertainty range is wide, so the result carries a Limited data-strength label.
analysisWindow: Synthetic records from December 27, 2017 through December 27, 2025.

name: Jordan Carter
court: Shelby County General Sessions Criminal Court
label: Bigger racial gaps
strongestSignal: Black defendants had the higher adjusted incarceration-to-serve rate in the comparison with White defendants.
comparisonHighlights: Black defendants had an adjusted incarceration-to-serve rate about 27 percentage points higher than White defendants in the fixture comparison.
The largest adjusted sentence-length difference was about 67%.
This is a synthetic stress-test result and is not evidence about a real judge.
analysisWindow: Synthetic records from December 27, 2017 through December 27, 2025.

name: Morgan Brooks
court: Shelby County General Sessions Criminal Court
label: Not Enough Data
strongestSignal: The fixture did not meet the 50-case publication minimum.
comparisonHighlights: CourtScope withholds the score rather than filling the gap with an estimate.
Not Enough Data is not a positive or negative finding about the judge.
analysisWindow: Synthetic records from December 27, 2017 through December 27, 2025.
